title: Disable Ad Astra Meteors
description: This removes the meteors found in the Ad Astra mod.
body:
# Meteors have been removed from newer versions of Ad Astra (≥1.15.7) making this datapack useless for these versions.

## A very simple datapack that disables [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra/versions) meteors from appearing in a world.

If you want to disable the oil wells I also have [that](https://modrinth.com/datapack/disable-ad-astra-oil-wells). You can use both at the same time.\
Anyone is free to use this and modify it however they want without my consent.

----
[![My referral link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qlYwaNHX/images/22395465ae7cc0ad6fa0b453444a3a4e974f008b.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=280)
----
